name: Ceruli, Guru of Dark World

desc: If this card is discarded to the GY by card effect: Special Summon this card to your opponent's field in Defense Position. If this card is Special Summoned by the effect of a "Dark World" card: Your opponent discards 1 card.

eff: If this card is discarded to the GY by card effect: Special Summon this card to your opponent's field in Defense Position. If this card is Special Summoned by the effect of a "Dark World" card: Your opponent discards 1 card.
